parameters.query:
with payload as (select $1::jsonb as p),
ins as (
  insert into gb_raw (source, source_id, payload)
  select 'gmail', p->>'id', p from payload
  where p->>'id' is not null
  on conflict (source, source_id) do nothing
  returning id
)
select pgmq.send('gb_q_normalize', jsonb_build_object('raw_id', id::text)) as msg_id from ins;

with payload as (select $1::jsonb as p),
ins as (
  insert into gb_raw (source, source_id, payload, storage_ref, content_hash)
  select 'pdf', p->>'hash', p, 'gbrain-bronze/' || (p->>'storage_path'), p->>'hash' from payload
  on conflict (source, source_id) do nothing
  returning id
)
select pgmq.send('gb_q_normalize', jsonb_build_object('raw_id', id::text)) as msg_id from ins;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filename: $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.filename, mime: $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.mime, hash: $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.hash, storage_path: $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.storage_path, storage_ref: 'gbrain-bronze/' + $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.storage_path, gmail_message_id: $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.gmail_message_id, thread_id: $('Each PDF + sha256').item.json.thread_id, gbrain_labels: ['call-notes'] }) }}
